forecast_text:
PHZ112-211415-
Kauai Leeward Waters-
328 PM HST Mon Jul 20 2026

.TONIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
15 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.TUESDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
14 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.TUESDAY NIGHT...East winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
11 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.WEDNESDAY...East winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at 13 seconds.
Scattered showers. 
.WEDNESDAY NIGHT...East winds to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 6 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at 20 seconds.
Scattered showers in the evening. 
.THURSDAY...East northeast winds to 20 knots. Seas 6 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
20 seconds. 
.THURSDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots. Seas 6 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 4 feet at
19 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.FRIDAY...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots, rising to 25 to
30 knots in the afternoon and evening, easing to 20 to 25 knots
after midnight. Seas 6 to 7 feet. Wave Detail: East 7 feet at
7 seconds and south 4 feet at 17 seconds. Isolated showers.
Scattered showers after midnight. 
.SATURDAY...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots, rising to 25 to
30 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet. Wave Detail: East 7 feet at 7 seconds
and south 4 feet at 18 seconds. Scattered showers in the morning.
Isolated showers.
forecast_text_110:
PHZ110-211415-
Kauai Northwest Waters-
328 PM HST Mon Jul 20 2026

.TONIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 4 feet at 6 seconds and south 3 feet at
12 seconds. Isolated showers this evening, then scattered showers
after midnight. 
.TUESDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds, south 4 feet at 11 seconds
and east 3 feet at 14 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.TUESDAY NIGHT...East winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 13 seconds and south 4 feet at
11 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.WEDNESDAY...East winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 5 feet at 12 seconds and south 3 feet at 10 seconds.
Scattered showers, mainly in the morning. 
.WEDNESDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds to 20 knots. Seas 5 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 12 seconds and south 3 feet
at 20 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.THURSDAY...East winds to 20 knots. Seas 6 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 6 feet at 8 seconds, south southwest 4 feet at
20 seconds and east 3 feet at 12 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.THURSDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots. Seas 6 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds, south southwest
4 feet at 19 seconds and east 3 feet at 11 seconds. Scattered
showers. 
.FRIDAY...East winds 20 to 25 knots, becoming east northeast
25 to 30 knots in the afternoon and evening, easing to 20 to
25 knots after midnight. Seas 6 to 8 feet. Wave Detail: East
7 feet at 7 seconds and south southwest 4 feet at 17 seconds.
Scattered showers in the morning, then isolated showers in the
afternoon. Scattered showers through the day. 
.SATURDAY...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots, rising to 25 to
30 knots in the afternoon and evening, easing to 20 to 25 knots
after midnight. Seas 7 to 8 feet. Wave Detail: East 8 feet at
16 seconds and south southwest 4 feet at 18 seconds. Scattered
showers, mainly in the morning.
forecast_text_111:
PHZ111-211415-
Kauai Windward Waters-
328 PM HST Mon Jul 20 2026

.TONIGHT...East northeast winds to 15 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
15 seconds. Numerous showers. 
.TUESDAY...East winds 10 to 15 knots. Seas 5 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds, south 4 feet at 14 seconds and
east 3 feet at 14 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.TUESDAY NIGHT...East winds 10 to 15 knots. Seas 6 to 7 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 13 seconds and south 4 feet at
12 seconds. Scattered showers in the evening, then numerous
showers after midnight. 
.WEDNESDAY...East winds to 15 knots, rising to 20 knots in the
afternoon. Seas 6 to 7 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at
12 seconds and south 4 feet at 13 seconds. Numerous showers,
mainly in the morning. 
.WEDNESDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds to 20 knots. Seas 6 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 12 seconds and south 4 feet
at 20 seconds. Scattered showers after midnight. 
.THURSDAY...East winds to 20 knots. Seas 6 to 7 feet. Wave
Detail: East 5 feet at 12 seconds and south 4 feet at 20 seconds.
Scattered showers in the morning. Isolated showers in the
afternoon. 
.THURSDAY NIGHT...East winds to 20 knots. Seas 6 to 8 feet. Wave
Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds, south 4 feet at 20 seconds and
east 3 feet at 11 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.FRIDAY...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots. Seas 7 to 8 feet.
Wave Detail: East 7 feet at 7 seconds and south 4 feet at
17 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.SATURDAY...East northeast winds 20 to 25 knots. Seas 7 to
8 feet. Wave Detail: East 8 feet at 16 seconds and south 4 feet
at 18 seconds. Scattered showers in the morning, then isolated
showers through the night. Scattered showers after midnight.
